finding: The TASK-TEAM-0053 handoff and closed-task evidence described a Gemini Direct bridge as implemented, but `packages/core/src/team-runtime/providers/gemini-direct.ts` was absent from the current branch and every Git ref inspected. The closure claim therefore exceeded source reality.
expectedBehavior: Required deliverables named by a task card should be checked for tracked-file existence and reachable commit evidence before close; manual live requirements must remain explicitly unproven until run artifacts exist.
evidenceOrRepro: `git log --all -- packages/core/src/team-runtime/providers/gemini-direct.ts` returned no commits, while the handoff named the file as the preferred and required direct bridge.
followUp: TASK-TEAM-0071 restores the missing implementation and adds behavior-level three-vendor coverage; closeout must include source, validator, and live evidence.
